warnings: This is the cover/summary sheet (1/20) of a 20-sheet ปร.4 BOQ book for this house's ฐานรากเสาเข็ม (pile foundation) variant, 'บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย แบบที่ 5' (drawing no. S58136, AR58005, SN-58082, EE58081). This house's BOQ book has 20 total sheets, not 23 like house #4 -- confirmed directly from the printed 'แผ่นที่ 1/20' footer, so do not assume the 23-sheet count carries over from house #4.

Source PNG (หน้า77) is a landscape scan containing 2 rotated portrait sheets side by side. Verified by cropping the PNG into left/right halves and rotating each 90 degrees counter-clockwise: the physical RIGHT half becomes this sheet (1/20, สรุปงาน/summary); the physical LEFT half becomes sheet 2/20 (extracted separately as _หน้า77_2_structural_boq.json) -- same left/right-half convention as house #4's equivalent pages.

All quantity, unit-price and amount cells are blank in the original document for every summary row and the final total row -- only category labels and the 'รวม' unit placeholder are printed for items 1-4, matching the pattern seen on house #4's equivalent cover sheet.

doc_page=75 read from a page-number stamp that is split across the left/right crop boundary (a '7' bleeds into the left half's edge, a '5' appears on this right half's edge) -- reassembles to '75', consistent with the doc_page = png_page - 2 relationship established on house #4's equivalent BOQ range and with the task brief's statement that the ฐานรากเสาเข็ม document starts at doc-page 75 (PNG 77).
